data.title: Wearable Devices Announces a Warrant Inducement Transaction for $5.0 Million in Gross Proceeds
data.description: Yokneam Illit, Israel - Today, Wearable Devices Ltd. (Nasdaq: WLDS, WLDSW) unveiled its agreement with an institutional investor to exercise warrants for 2,904,499 ordinary shares at $1.73 each, generating around $5.0 million in cash. After accounting for fees, the net proceeds will be directed towards operational needs and other corporate objectives. Wearable Devices specializes in AI-powered touchless sensing wearables, marking a strategic move for the tech growth company.

data.title: Hall Render Welcomes Three Shareholders to Strengthen National Health Care Practice
data.description: Indianapolis - On April 20, 2026, Hall Render, Killian, Heath & Lyman, P.C. (Hall Render) announced the inclusion of Susan Banks, Summer Martin, and Rebecca Merrill as Shareholders, enhancing the renowned health care firm. This move bolsters the firm's national standing.

data.title: The President is set to attend the White House Correspondents’ Dinner, breaking his boycott. First Lady to accompany. What's next?
data.description: The president, known for his confrontations with the news media, will end his avoidance of an event honoring the news media by attending alongside the first lady. This unexpected appearance raises questions about potential conflicts or controversies that may arise during the event.

data.title: Vertafore advances AI innovation at Accelerate 2026, embedding AI across workflows to transform the insurance lifecycle
data.description: Vertafore and NetVU collaborate to streamline the insurance industry by enhancing communication between platform, agents, and workflows. Accelerate 2026 event in Denver on April 20, 2026, gathered a dedicated group of insurance experts aiming to leverage AI technology for improved efficiency. The initiative focuses on transitioning from obstacles to seamless processes in the sector, with a strong emphasis on enhanced communication and operational efficacy.
Company repurchased 100,000 shares at $10 each in a recent transaction.

data.title: Speakeasy's SDK Generator Comparison
data.description: Report compares five popular SDK generators based on language support, runtime safety, dependency size, OpenAPI accuracy, and offline deployment backing. Recently released by Speakeasy, the analysis examined the top SDK tools in the market.

data.title: Weekly report share buyback from April 13 to April 17, 2026
data.description: Technip Energies (PARIS:TE) has reported its recent share buyback activity in compliance with regulations. Between April 13, 2026, and April 17, 2026, the company purchased an undisclosed number of its own shares as part of its buyback program.

data.title: Target Announces 2026 Bullseye Builds, Investing in Community Spaces with Volunteerism and Design
data.description: In 2026, Target aims to complete the construction of 13 Bullseye Builds through its Community Program, with a significant investment of $1 million. These builds will be tailored to reflect the unique characteristics and needs of the local communities they serve, leveraging Target's design capabilities. The first of these projects are set to debut in May in Denver and Las Vegas. The initiative of Bullseye Builds was initially launched in 2024.

data.title: Xinghaoya Provides Free and Discreet Shipping on Expansive Selection of Exciting Products
data.description: Global consumers now have the opportunity to secure complimentary products with their personal purchases. Xinghaoya recently announced their initiative to provide free and inconspicuous delivery on all purchases, catering to customers worldwide. This service ensures a convenient and confidential shopping experience for all, regardless of their location, with no additional shipping fees.

data.title: Privacy concerns with stablecoins hindering their adoption by banks and fintechs. Four solutions in competition to address this.
data.description: Financial institutions and financial technology companies are hesitant to embrace stablecoin payments due to concerns over potential exposure of transaction data to competitors. To address this issue, four different privacy solutions are currently vying to provide a secure method for conducting transactions without compromising sensitive data. These initiatives aim to safeguard the privacy of users and ensure that businesses can operate without the risk of competitors accessing their transaction information.

data.title: Exco Technologies Limited Announces Second Quarter Results on April 29, 2026
data.description: Exco Technologies Limited (TSX – XTC) has announced that it will release its financial results for the second quarter ending March 31, 2026 after market close on April 29, 2026. A conference call to discuss the results is scheduled for April 30 at 10:00 a.m. To listen to the live audio webcast, visit www.excocorp.com or https://edge.media-server.com/mmc/p/7xw8y4gn shortly before the event. For those wishing to participate in the question-and-answer session, registration is available at https://register-conf.media-server.com/register/BI84bf2962f01e44b2bd3d64bfdccb9375 to receive the dial-in details and unique PIN. Attendees are advised to join 10 minutes before the start of the event, although registration and dial-in are open throughout the call.
